ingredients.name: Cafe Renoir Ikebukuro Sunshine 60 Street

ingredients.address: 大和ビル ２階, 1 Chome-11-4 Higashiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 1 of Season 2, Kazuya meets Chizuru here in a pivotal early scene that sets the tone for their complicated relationship continuing into the new season. The classic kissaten atmosphere of this Ikebukuro cafe became a recognizable backdrop for fans.

ingredients.name: Maxell Aqua Park Shinagawa
ingredients.localName: マクセル アクアパーク 品川
ingredients.address: 品川プリンスホテル内, 4 Chome-10-30 Takanawa, Minato City, Tokyo 108-8611, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Aqua Park Shinagawa is the centerpiece of Episode 8's memorable date, where Kazuya and Chizuru watch the dolphin show together in a moment charged with unspoken feelings. This is one of the most documented pilgrimage spots from the season, with fans recreating the jellyfish tank and show viewing area shots.

ingredients.name: The Stadium
ingredients.localName: ザ スタジアム
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒108-8611 Tokyo, Minato City, 10 ２F, 東京都港区高輪４丁目１０−３０ 品川プリンスホテル内 マクセル アクアパーク品川
ingredients.entityContext: The Stadium venue inside Maxell Aqua Park Shinagawa is where Kazuya and Chizuru watch the dolphin performance together in Episode 8, the scene that defines their Episode 8 date arc.

ingredients.name: Mercedes me
ingredients.description: Mercedes me — local spot in Kitashinagawa, Tokyo, near Funasei and Points Check Machines. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
